title: Allow filtering on shareable views
excerpt:
We have created a database to share with our clients via shareable view, but it’s not very user friendly because it doesn’t let them filter for information (the way we can filter on the internal view). 
This would be a s…

posts.author: lberhe (Lette)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have created a database to share with our clients via shareable view, but it’s not very user friendly because it doesn’t let them filter for information (the way we can filter on the internal view).

This would be a super helpful feature to have, thanks!
